label: Mike - Soft Brakes (High Risk)
transcript: Hey this is Mike on bus 402, I'm in Boston near South Station. My brakes are feeling soft and I have a full load of passengers. I can't drive this safely, need a swap or a tow immediately.

label: Sarah - HVAC Failure
transcript: Hi it's Sarah, dispatch. Routing a message for bus 108. I'm in Philadelphia, at the corner of 5th and Main. The AC just completely cut out, it's about 95 degrees today. Passengers are complaining.

label: John - Rear Door Sensor
transcript: Bus 99, John here. I'm in Cambridge. The rear door sensor is acting up, won't let me pull away from the curb. I've tried cycling the battery but no luck.

label: Urgent - Medical Flag
transcript: Dispatch! This is bus 55. We're on the bridge coming into Boston. I have a passenger who has collapsed. We need an ambulance at the next stop. I'm stopping the bus now.

label: Critical - Smoke from Engine
transcript: This is bus 212. I'm pulled over on I-95 South near the PA border. There is smoke coming from the engine compartment. No fire yet, but I'm evacuating the bus.

label: Dave - Grinding Noise
transcript: Hey it's Dave. I'm in Quincy. Bringing bus 303 back. There's a heavy grinding noise from the front right wheel every time I turn. It's driveable but noisy.

label: ADA Lift Malfunction
transcript: Bus 15. We're in West Philly. The ADA lift is stuck halfway down. I have a wheelchair user stuck. I need a technician out here to manually retract it.

label: ITS/Radio Issue
transcript: Bus 44. I'm in downtown Boston. My radio is just static and the ITS terminal keeps rebooting. Just calling from my personal cell to let you know.
